description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, branding above the right cuff, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergent Do not wring, scrub or bleach Tumble dry low Medium steam iron do not iron on decorations The addition of refined details in this formal staple elevates this cotton shirt above the ordinary. Incorporating this season's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt from arrow's Premium collection tops our officewear wish list! Style it with pale chinos and understated, tonal accessories. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
